title: Model Cards for Model Reporting
summary: A foundational paper for documenting intended use, performance, limitations, and ethical considerations.

title: Datasheets for Datasets
summary: A practical structure for dataset provenance, composition, collection, recommended uses, and maintenance.

title: On the Dangers of Stochastic Parrots
summary: A widely discussed analysis of risks in large language models, including data, scale, bias, and deployment harms.

title: Toward Trustworthy AI Development
summary: A framing paper for trustworthy AI practices across development, deployment, monitoring, and accountability.

title: Concrete Problems in AI Safety
summary: A useful taxonomy for robustness, reward hacking, distribution shift, and monitoring concerns.

title: A Survey of Methods for Explaining Black Box Models
summary: A broad survey of interpretability methods that helps auditors choose explanation techniques carefully.
